name: 24/7 Golf
address: 4255 Alpine Ave NW SUITE A, Comstock Park, MI 49321
about: 24/7 Golf is a chain of indoor golf and pickleball simulators located throughout Michigan. They operate 24 hours a day, 365 days a year, offering hourly bay rentals for individuals and groups. The facilities are equipped with Trackman iO technology in each of their bays, providing a premium simulation experience. With multiple locations in Grand Rapids, Dewitt, Haslett, Ludington, and Traverse City, the venue caters to both local residents and visitors looking for a convenient way to play regardless of weather or time of day.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium Trackman iO technology for accurate ball and club tracking
Multiple locations throughout Michigan for convenient access
Available for private parties and group events

food_and_drink.notes: No on-site food or kitchen mentioned
No mention of an on-site bar

simulator_hardware.notes: State-of-the-art radar, infrared and high-speed imaging system at all locations

faq.answer: The website does not specify if clubs are provided, so it's recommended to bring your own set.

faq.answer: There is no mention of an on-site kitchen or bar, and no policy against bringing outside food or drinks is stated.

faq.answer: The website does not provide a specific time estimate for playing 18 holes.

faq.answer: The venue does not explicitly state its policy on children, but the ability to book by the hour and host parties suggests it could accommodate families.
